headcount_quote: As of December 28, 2024, we had approximately 26,000 employees worldwide.
research_notes: FY2024 10-K (fiscal year ending December 28, 2024), filed January 30, 2025. CIK 0000002488, accession 0000002488-25-000011. ~26,000 worldwide employees (up from ~25,000 at end of FY2023). Human Capital section covers diversity/equity/inclusion, compensation philosophy, benefits, and employee development — NO functional/role breakdown by headcount. AMD's separately published ESG reports may contain EEO-1 category data but these are not part of the 10-K. Data sourced from training knowledge as SEC EDGAR was proxy-blocked in research session. Roles array empty per real-filings-only policy.
